subcodes.first_line: O thou valiant one in the arena of mystic knowledge, render thanks that thou hast been blessed with such a noble father who attained unto the love of the Ancient Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرد میدان عرفان شکر کن که بچنین پدر بزرگواری موفق گشتی که بمحبت جمال قدم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
